zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：短线震荡上行延续
zh.content:
当前ADA/USD延续震荡上行结构，价格稳居0.18附近并逼近阶段高点，短线仍维持反弹节奏，多头动能占优但未出现趋势加速信号。

MACD柱值持续为正，显示短期多头动能仍在累积，但缺乏信号线数据确认；价格明显站上20日均线0.168，趋势支撑结构转强。

上方阻力关注0.1805近期高点及0.185整数关口，下方支撑位于0.175与20日均线0.168，若跌破可能回测区间下沿。

操作建议以回调低吸为主，未放量突破前不追高，若放量突破0.1805可顺势轻仓跟进，否则维持区间震荡思路。

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ADA/USD is showing a constructive short-term recovery, with price action stabilizing above the recent consolidation range. The pair has advanced roughly 2.57% in the last 24-hour period, pushing toward the intraday high at 0.180536. The structure suggests a mild upward bias, with buyers gradually absorbing supply after the prior dip. Momentum remains modest but increasingly aligned with a short-term bullish continuation while volatility stays contained.

Momentum indicators reinforce the emerging bullish tilt. The MACD reading at 0.0042596814 sits in positive territory, implying strengthening upside pressure despite the absence of a visible signal line. Price trading well above the SMA(20) at 0.16827265 confirms a supportive trend structure, with the moving average acting as dynamic support. Although RSI is unavailable, price behavior suggests improving relative strength rather than exhaustion.

Immediate resistance is concentrated around the recent high at 0.180536, closely aligned with the psychological 0.18–0.181 zone where sellers have begun to appear. A sustained breakout above this area could open a path toward 0.185 as the next upside objective. On the downside, initial support sits near 0.175143, with stronger structural support anchored at the SMA(20) around 0.16827265. Holding above these supports maintains bullish structure.

From a trading perspective, the bias favors cautious long positioning while price remains above the SMA(20). Pullbacks toward 0.175–0.178 may offer favorable entry zones, provided momentum holds. Risk management is critical, with invalidation below 0.175143 or more conservative stops under 0.16827265. Upside targets are staged at 0.1805 and 0.185, where partial profit-taking can help lock in gains while preserving exposure to continuation.
